app.script:
df <- get.input()
fit <- lm(velocity_m_s ~ time_s, data = df)
plot(df$time_s, df$velocity_m_s,
  pch = 19, col = "purple", cex = 1.6,
  xlab = "time_s", ylab = "velocity_m_s",
  main = "Velocity-Time Graph"
)
arrows(df$time_s, df$velocity_m_s - df$velocity_err_m_s,
  df$time_s, df$velocity_m_s + df$velocity_err_m_s,
  angle = 90, code = 3, length = 0.05
)
abline(fit, col = "navy", lwd = 2)
cat(sprintf("Estimated acceleration: %.2f m/s^2\n", coef(fit)[2]))

runtimeStatus.text: サンプルを読み込みました
